title: Voluntary Accommodations Prior to Deployment. In the event that
content: 36 accommodation facilities are provided by either the Philippine manning agency or the 37 foreign principal/employer or as provided under the applicable CBA to a seafarer prior to 38 deployment, the accommodation facilities shall meet the minimum standards set by the 39 Department, in consultation with stakeholders. 40 41
